tweets.text: Claude Fable is relentlessly proactive
tweets.summary: After two days of experience with Claude Fable 5 I think the best way to describe it is relentlessly proactive. It knows a whole lot of tricks and it will deploy pretty much any of them to get to its goal.

tweets.text: Governance as acceleration: data proves it’s not a speed bump

This may look like the review cycle that delays the launch, committee that questions the model, or even documentation requirement that sits between a wo

tweets.summary: Generative AI is no longer a pilot that leaders can observe from a distance. It is in contact centers, developer workflows, reporting layers, and autonomous agents acting on behalf of the business. As BARC's research on modernizing governance for the era of agentic AI shows, the stakes r

tweets.text: Sovereignty isn't where your AI runs. It's whether it answers to you.
tweets.summary: Last week, a government order took the world's best AI model offline in hours. No one deleted it and no server failed. A single directive put the most capable model on the market out of reach for everyone not a citizen of one country.
